basic_details.job_title: ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 118 Professors Posts
basic_details.job_location: ESIC PGIMSRs and ESIC Medical Colleges across various States; liable to posting anywhere in India
basic_details.short_information: The latest Employees’ State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Professor (Teaching Faculty – Medical Specialties) posts! Published on 19 May 2026 at www.esic.gov.in, this new recruitment drive offers 118 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age group of up to 50 years (relaxations as applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/ESIC employees) and possessing the required medical or postgraduate qualifications can apply offline via the prescribed application form from now until 27 July 2026 (03 August 2026 for remote area candidates). Find all details about

application_fee.details: Application fee is payable via Demand Draft/Banker’s Cheque only, in favour of “ESI Fund Account No. 2” payable at Delhi. | Fee once paid will not be refunded in any circumstances and applications without the prescribed fee (where applicable) will be rejected without correspondence.

qualification.nationality: Candidate must be a citizen of India; certain categories of Nepal, Bhutan, Tibetan refugees and PIO from specified countries may also apply, subject to Government of India eligibility certificate.
qualification.education_qualification: A recognised medical qualification included in First or Second Schedule or Part‑II of Third Schedule to IMC Act 1956, fulfilling Section 13(3) conditions where applicable. Postgraduate qualification – MD/MS or equivalent in the concerned subject or allied discipline.
qualification.experience: Four years’ teaching experience as Reader/Associate Professor in a recognised medical college in the concerned specialty; OR Three years’ teaching experience as Associate Professor in the concerned specialty, with at least four research publications in indexed/national journals as first author, of which minimum two are during Associate Professor tenure.
qualification.details: Candidates must ensure that they satisfy all eligibility conditions relating to nationality, age, educational qualifications and teaching experience as of the closing date of receipt of applications.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level‑13 in Pay Matrix (Rs. 1,23,100 – 2,15,900) plus Non‑Practicing Allowance (NPA) and other admissible allowances
salary_details.details: Selected candidates will be appointed in Pay Level‑13 of the 7th CPC pay matrix with Non‑Practicing Allowance and other admissible benefits. | Basic Pay: Level‑13 (Rs. 1,23,100 – 2,15,900) in the pay matrix. Allowances: Dearness Allowance (DA), Non‑Practicing Allowance (NPA), House Rent Allowance (HRA), Transport Allowance and other allowances as per Central Government/ESIC rules. Career Prospects: Promotional avenues available under DACP guidelines; opportunities for academic and research growth within ESIC medical institutions.

selection_process: Selection will be made on the basis of an Interview conducted by the ESIC Selection Board
with possible shortlisting based on experience.
If the number of applications is large

ESIC may shortlist candidates for interview based on teaching experience beyond the minimum required level (Associate Professor/Reader or above) as per Recruitment Rules. Category‑wise minimum qualifying marks in interview: UR/EWS – 50
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted offline only in the prescribed application form attached with the notification. No online application facility is available for this recruitment.
Download and print the official notification and Application Form for “Professor in ESI Corporation‑2026” from ESIC website or your job portal.

Fill the application form in BLOCK letters with accurate details such as specialty applied for, personal information, educational qualifications, teaching experience, registration details and publication list.
important_instructions: ESIC follows Government of India rules on age relaxation, community reservation and PwBD concessions.

SC/ST – up to 5 years; OBC – up to 3 years; PwBD – up to 10 years (maximum age on closing date not exceeding 56 years), with cumulative relaxation for SC/ST/OBC PwBD as per norms. Ex‑Servicemen and ECOs/SSCOs – age relaxation up to 5 years subject to conditions on length of service and release certificates. Only candidates belonging to castes/communities in the Central List of SC/ST/OBC and having valid, current certificates in the prescribed format will get reservation benefits; multiple applications in different categories will lead to rejection.

Eligibility (age, qualifications, experience etc.) is calculated with reference to the closing date of applications – 27.07.2026 for most candidates. Mere submission of application or call for interview does not confer any right to appointment; candidature remains provisional until verification. Incomplete/unsigned applications, or those not in prescribed proforma, without required documents, fee, or received after the last date will be rejected without communication. Any false statement or suppression of material information can lead to cancellation of candidature/appointment at any stage. Selected candidates will be on probation as per ESIC rules and are liable to be posted anywhere in India; state preferences are only indicative and not binding.
